Sérgio Alves is a Computer Science researcher focused on Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), passionate about understanding how technology can contribute to a better future. His research trajectory has been focused on accessibility and health. He received his Ph.D with distinction in January 2026 from the Faculty of Sciences at the University of Lisbon, with the topic "Democratizing User Interfaces."

His research has focused on exploring digital systems to improve well-being and healthcare, as well as empowering individuals to take an active role in the design and use of digital technologies by promoting access and control in user interface design.

Find out more about Sérgio Alves: https://sergioalves.eu
